creator: adamwonski@interia.pl
text:
functions:
   debug
   info
   warn
   err
use 'logger' for sending messages to syslog - but with no priority
assigned (the default is user.notice)

Fix: 

Could it have the priority added? For example:
   debug - logger -p debug ...
   info - logger -p info ...
   warn - logger -p warn ...
   err - logger -p err ...
